title: How European governments are trying to keep a lid on petrol prices
summary_full: Hungary – where the general election is just one month away and the nationalist government is trailing in the polls – was the first to put a limit on prices at the pump
summary_public: Hungary – where the general election is just one month away and the nationalist government is trailing in the polls – was the first to put a limit on prices at the pump
